title: The Reformer Phan Chau Trinh
summary: The scholar with the motto 'Enlighten the people, invigorate the spirit, and improve the people's livelihoods' - desiring to modernize the country through education and culture.

slides.text: Unlike Phan Boi Chau, Phan Chau Trinh believed that to save the country, the first step was to help our people become more knowledgeable and stronger.
slides.imagePrompt: Phan Chau Trinh in a modern style suite and short hair, looking at a group of people reading newspapers, progressive look, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He introduced the slogans: 'Khai dan tri' (Enlighten the people), 'Chan dan khi' (Invigorate the spirit), and 'Hau dan sinh' (Improve the people's livelihoods).
slides.imagePrompt: Three icons representing knowledge (a book), spirit (a rising sun), and life (a bowl of rice), glowing and interconnected, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Phan Chau Trinh was very enthusiastic about opening schools, encouraging everyone to cut their hair short, wear modern clothes, and discard backward customs.
slides.imagePrompt: A busy community school (Duy Tân trường học), people cutting their long hair, wearing modern clothes, sense of excitement, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: His ideas breathed a new life into Vietnamese society at that time, reminding us that knowledge is the key to freedom.
slides.imagePrompt: A large golden key made of light unlocking a library door, symbol of enlightenment, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: By what path did Phan Chau Trinh want to save the country?
Which of the following famous sayings belongs to Phan Chau Trinh?
options: Enlighten the people, invigorate the spirit, and improve the people's livelihoods
Live by the light of the lamp, die by the sound of the trumpet
Learning must go hand in hand with practice
slides.answer: Enlighten the people, invigorate the spirit, and improve the people's livelihoods
